title: AvidXchange Empowers ERP Partners with Accounts Payable as a Service
author: Doug Anderson
description: AvidXchange introduces an embedded AP automation solution that allows ERP platforms to offer seamless accounts payable and payment workflows directly within their systems, powered by AI and supporting over 1.3 million suppliers.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as an ERP platform using AvidXchange's service without additional context

title: Yachting: M3 Launches the Global Summit for a Sustainable Future from Monaco
author: N/A
description: The first edition of the 'World Yachting Summit' was held in Monaco, bringing together experts and stakeholders to discuss the future of the yachting industry. The event focused on topics such as sustainability, modernization, and the need for a cultural revolution in the sector.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: M3, a Monaco-based marine consultancy firm, conceived the World Yachting Summit, which was described as an 'extraordinary initiative' that 'generated enthusiasm' and 'leaves a lasting impression on the yachting industry'.

title: Yachting: M3 announces ‘World Yachting Summit’ in Monaco from April 15, experts to discuss the future of the Industry
author: Globe Newswire
description: M3, a leader in coastal development and marina design, is hosting the 'World Yachting Summit' in Monaco from April 15-17, 2025. The event will bring together industry experts to discuss the future of the yachting sector, focusing on themes like economy, sustainability, technology, and regulation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: M3 is hosting the 'World Yachting Summit', an initiative aimed at fostering dialogue and addressing key issues in the yachting industry. This suggests a positive outlook and commitment to the industry's future.
